title: Practice: task 5
description: Training set with gradual difficulty growth: easy -> medium -> hard.

exercises.title: Факториал
exercises.text: Чему равно значение x после: x=1; for i in range(1,6): x*=i
exercises.explanation: Correct answer: 120. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.
hints: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
Check edge cases: minimum and maximum input bounds.
exercises.code_template:
x = 1
for i in range(1, 6):
    x *= i
print(x)
exercises.hint_after_first_error: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
exercises.full_explanation: Correct answer: 120. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.

exercises.title: Фибоначчи вручную
exercises.explanation: Correct answer: 21. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.
hints: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
Check edge cases: minimum and maximum input bounds.
exercises.code_template:
a, b = 1, 1
for _ in range(6):
    a, b = b, a + b
print(b)
exercises.hint_after_first_error: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
exercises.full_explanation: Correct answer: 21. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.

exercises.title: Сумма ряда
exercises.explanation: Correct answer: 1023. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.
hints: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
Check edge cases: minimum and maximum input bounds.
exercises.code_template:
s = 0
x = 1
while x <= 512:
    s += x
    x *= 2
print(s)
exercises.hint_after_first_error: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
exercises.full_explanation: Correct answer: 1023. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.
